plugins.name: luly-v0-2-8
plugins.description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.2.8 adds optional tooltip color tokens (`tooltipTextColor` + `tooltipBackgroundColor`) — emit explicitly when primary/primaryLight don't read well inline (primary close to background, exotic primary, or dedicated brand link color). Defaults fall back to primary pair.
